name: Farmhouse Dining Table
short_description: A sturdy, hand-crafted farmhouse table built to last generations.
long_description: Our Farmhouse Dining Table is the heart of every home. Hand-built from solid white oak with a hand-rubbed oil finish that brings out the natural grain. Features heavy-duty mortise-and-tenon joinery for heirloom strength. Available in lengths from 60" to 108" to seat your whole family. Each table is unique — knots, grain patterns, and mineral streaks are celebrated, not hidden.

name: Live-Edge Coffee Table
short_description: A stunning live-edge slab coffee table with hairpin legs.
long_description: A single slab of black walnut, kiln-dried and finished with a satin polyurethane to protect the natural live edge. Paired with hand-bent steel hairpin legs for an industrial-meets-organic look. The live edge is preserved in its natural state — no two tables are alike. Perfect as a centerpiece for any living room. Custom sizes and leg finishes available upon request.

name: Floating Wall Shelves (Set of 3)
short_description: Minimalist floating shelves crafted from reclaimed pine.
long_description: These floating wall shelves are cut from reclaimed barn pine, lightly sanded and finished with a clear matte lacquer that lets the wood's history show through. Each shelf ships with concealed mounting hardware for a clean, floating appearance. Sold as a set of three in graduated lengths (24", 30", 36"). Perfect for home offices, living rooms, or entryways. Custom stain options available.

name: Cedar Garden Bench
short_description: A beautiful, weather-resistant cedar bench for indoors or out.
long_description: Hand-crafted from Western Red Cedar, naturally resistant to rot and insects — no chemical treatment required. Joinery is all traditional wedged tenon, built to handle outdoor seasons without a wobble. The seat slats are gently radiused for comfort. Finished with a penetrating cedar oil that deepens the color and extends the life of the wood. Equally at home on a porch, in an entryway, or at the foot of a bed.

name: Platform Bed Frame
short_description: A low-profile platform bed frame in solid ash with clean lines.
long_description: Our Platform Bed Frame is designed for those who love clean, modern lines with the warmth of solid wood. Built from solid ash with a subtle wire-brushed texture and a natural oil-wax finish. The low-profile platform base eliminates the need for a box spring. Features a slatted base for mattress airflow. Available in Queen, King, and California King. Custom headboard heights available. Ships flat-pack with simple assembly hardware.

name: Walnut Side Table
short_description: A compact, tapered-leg side table in rich black walnut.
long_description: The perfect companion to your sofa or beside your bed. The top is solid black walnut with a hand-rubbed Danish oil finish that highlights the deep chocolate tones and natural figure of the wood. The tapered legs are turned on a lathe in-house and mortised directly into the top for lasting rigidity. A lower shelf provides handy storage for books or a small plant. Built to be both beautiful and practical.
